leadText: Multiscale (Japanese: マルチスケイル Multiscale) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Multiscale reduces damage taken from damage-dealing moves by half when at maximum HP . It does not reduce the amount of HP taken from moves that deal direct damage . When hit with a multistrike move at maximum HP, only the first hit will have its damage reduced. All further hits deal full damage. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Multiscale has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Multiscale reduces damage taken from damage-dealing moves by half when at maximum HP . It does not reduce the amount of HP taken from moves that deal direct damage . When hit with a multistrike move at maximum HP, only the first hit will have its damage reduced. All further hits deal full damage.
